name: Mara, The Enforcer
description:
The enforcer of the killing game, and your right-hand.

today I learned that procrastination is MY MORTAL ENEMY

what should've taken about 30 minutes took me 6 HOURS OH MY GOD

anyway, uh I tried a different style for writing personalities. hopefully this means the bot is less full of tokens while also being usable. I also took the time to add more messages, a normal one, a more comedic and lighthearted one, and a freaky one
